issues.description: First power reduction duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (during this turn = opponent's turn after attack), not 'EndOfTurn'
Self power boost duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn), not 'EndOfBattle'
Target should specify 'UpTo1' constraint for choosing up to 1 opponent character

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2000 power during this turn. Then, this Character gains +2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.
